## Runtime.RuntimeSugarIngredient class

A resolved view of a sugar ingredient with navigation capabilities. Immutable - does not allow modification of underlying data.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class RuntimeSugarIngredient extends RuntimeIngredientBase implements IRuntimeSugarIngredient 
```
**Extends:** [RuntimeIngredientBase](./ts-chocolate.runtime.runtimeingredientbase.md)

**Implements:** [IRuntimeSugarIngredient](./ts-chocolate.runtime.iruntimesugaringredient.md)

## Remarks

The constructor for this class is marked as internal. Third-party code should not call the constructor directly or create subclasses that extend the `RuntimeSugarIngredient` class.
